name: chat-demo-page
description: Create proof-of-work demo page demonstrating AI SDK chat with persistence
acceptanceCriteria: chatDomain added to App.tsx DomainProvider domains map
Page uses useDomains() to access chat store (NOT custom context)
Demonstrates creating new ChatSession via createChatSession action
Demonstrates sending messages and receiving AI responses
Shows ChatMessage list with role indicators (user/assistant)
Shows tool calls made by assistant
Shows CreatedArtifact list linking to schemas created
Data survives page refresh (proves persistence pipeline)
Loading states and error handling included
